𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗘𝗕𝗔𝗦𝗘 | To provide a unified and intuitive interface for managing files across multiple cloud storage services, accessible from a single desktop-like application.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified and intuitive interface for managing files across multiple cloud storage services, accessible from a single desktop-like application.
📅 Created: Mar 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Desktop shell interface in the browser
✅ Unified file browser across providers
✅ Support for Google Drive, AWS S3, local filesystem, Dropbox, OneDrive
✅ Batch operations (copy, move, transfer, delete) across providers
✅ Smart conflict resolution
✅ Real-time progress and resumable uploads
✅ Pluggable provider system
✅ GraphQL API


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 259 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 30 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 14 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Drivebase is an open-source, self-hosted platform that unifies multiple cloud storage providers into a single desktop-like interface. It allows users to browse, manage, and transfer files across services like Google Drive, S3, and local storage seamlessly.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/drivebase/drivebase

𝗪𝗜𝗡𝗣𝗢𝗗𝗫 | Running Windows applications as if they were native Linux applications on a Linux desktop.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Running Windows applications as if they were native Linux applications on a Linux desktop.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Native Linux windows for Windows apps
✅ Real icons and WM_CLASS integration
✅ Pin-to-taskbar support
✅ FreeRDP RemoteApp integration
✅ Zero configuration setup
✅ Bare-metal disguise for VM detection evasion


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 49 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 38 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

WinPodX allows Windows applications to run as native Linux applications, integrating them seamlessly into the Linux desktop environment. It uses FreeRDP RemoteApp and a zero-configuration approach to provide a native experience with real icons and taskbar integration.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/kernalix7/winpodx

𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗖𝗧-𝗕𝗜𝗧𝗦 | To enable developers to quickly integrate visually appealing and interactive animations and UI components into their React applications without extensive custom development.  🔥 Super Hot!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable developers to quickly integrate visually appealing and interactive animations and UI components into their React applications without extensive custom development.
📅 Created: Aug 2024 • Updated: Jun 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 130+ animated components (text, UI, backgrounds)
✅ Minimal dependencies and tree-shakeable
✅ Fully customizable via props or source code
✅ Multiple variants (JS-CSS, JS-TW, TS-CSS, TS-TW)
✅ Copy-paste ready for modern React projects
✅ Free creative tools: Background Studio, Shape Magic, Texture Lab


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 41.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.9K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

React Bits is an open-source library offering over 130 free, customizable animated React components for building engaging web interfaces. It focuses on providing ready-to-use text animations, UI elements, and backgrounds, with minimal dependencies and high adaptability.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/DavidHDev/react-bits

© 2026 - Curated with ❤️ for developers

𝗤𝗜𝗔𝗢𝗠𝗨-𝗔𝗡𝗬𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗡𝗚-𝗧𝗢-𝗡𝗢𝗧𝗘𝗕𝗢𝗢𝗞𝗟𝗠 | To ingest diverse content from various online and offline sources, process it using AI, and transform it into structured, digestible formats suitable for learning and presentation via NotebookLM.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To ingest diverse content from various online and offline sources, process it using AI, and transform it into structured, digestible formats suitable for learning and presentation via NotebookLM.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Multi-source content processing (WeChat articles, web pages, YouTube, PDF, Markdown, search queries, etc.)
✅ Content conversion to various formats (Podcast, PPT, MindMap, Quiz, Video, Report, Infographic, Flashcards)
✅ Paywall bypassing for over 300 websites
✅ OCR for scanned PDFs and images
✅ Audio transcription for audio files
✅ Integration with Claude Code Skill and Google NotebookLM


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 589 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python repository acts as a multi-source content processor for NotebookLM, leveraging Claude AI to convert various input formats like web pages, PDFs, and audio into structured outputs such as podcasts, presentations, mind maps, and quizzes. It features advanced capabilities like bypassing paywalls on over 300 websites.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/joeseesun/qiaomu-anything-to-notebooklm

𝗦𝗨𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗧𝗢𝗡𝗜𝗖 | To provide a fast, private, and efficient on-device text-to-speech solution for applications requiring real-time speech synthesis across multiple languages and platforms.  🌟 Rising Fast!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🍎 Swift 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a fast, private, and efficient on-device text-to-speech solution for applications requiring real-time speech synthesis across multiple languages and platforms.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Lightning-fast, low-latency, real-time synthesis
✅ 31-language multilingual support with language-agnostic processing
✅ Compact 99M-parameter open-weight model
✅ Edge-device ready (desktop, mobile, browser, resource-constrained hardware)
✅ Zero network dependency and complete privacy
✅ 44.1kHz high-quality audio output
✅ Expression tags for natural speech nuance
✅ Multi-runtime SDKs (Python, Node.js, WebGPU, Java, C++, C#, Go, Swift, iOS, Rust, Flutter)


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 12.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.3K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 87 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Supertonic is a high-performance, on-device multilingual text-to-speech (TTS) system that runs natively using ONNX Runtime. It offers fast, real-time speech synthesis across various platforms without cloud dependency, ensuring privacy and minimal overhead.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic
